summary: Iteration 14: Frontend-only testing of PDF/Excel export and Model Math. Fixed critical PDF export bug (jspdf-autotable v5 import pattern). All export formats working. Model math logic verified correct in code.
passed_tests: Export dropdown appears with 4 options: CSV, Excel, PDF, YAML
Export as CSV downloads site-sizing-export.csv with all site data
Export as Excel downloads site-sizing-export.xlsx with 3 sheets (Site Sizing, Bill of Materials, Summary)
Export as PDF downloads site-sizing-export.pdf with formatted report including summary boxes and tables
Export as YAML downloads site-sizing-export.yaml with structured data
Model math code review: GM/GMC roles use object capacity for sizing (gridObjects = dnsObjects + dhcpObjects)
Model math code review: DNS/DHCP combined role applies multiRoleCapacityMultiplier (1.3x) to QPS and LPS
Model math code review: Single-role DNS uses QPS and dnsObjects for sizing
Model math code review: Single-role DHCP uses LPS and dhcpObjects for sizing

bugs_fixed.issue: PDF export failing with 'doc.autoTable is not a function' error
bugs_fixed.root_cause: jspdf-autotable v5.x changed import pattern - side-effect import no longer works
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed from 'import "jspdf-autotable"' to 'import { autoTable } from "jspdf-autotable"' and updated all doc.autoTable({...}) calls to autoTable(doc, {...})

action_items: MINOR: Manual sites (added via 'Add Site' button) do not recalculate model when IPs change - they keep hardcoded TE-926 model. DC/branch sites work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: calculations.js Lines 98-114: GM/GMC roles correctly use gridObjects (dnsObjects + dhcpObjects) for sizing, NOT QPS/LPS
calculations.js Lines 117-147: DNS/DHCP combined role correctly applies multiRoleCapacityMultiplier (1.3x) to adjustedQPS and adjustedLPS
calculations.js Lines 150-166: DNS-only role correctly uses QPS and dnsObjects for sizing
calculations.js Lines 168-183: DHCP-only role correctly uses LPS and dhcpObjects for sizing
tokenData.js Line 80: multiRoleCapacityMultiplier is correctly set to 1.3
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 388-406: Manual sites are created with hardcoded model values and don't recalculate when IPs change (minor issue)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' with 4 DCs and 1 Site
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF/Excel export and model math features verified. Fixed jspdf-autotable v5 import issue. Export dropdown has 4 options (CSV, Excel, PDF, YAML). Excel creates 3 sheets. Model math logic is correct in code for all role types. Minor issue: manual sites don't recalculate model when IPs change.

csv.content: Site data with headers: Site Name, Type, IPs, KW, Role, Services, Platform, Model, Hardware SKU, Tokens

pdf.content: Formatted report with summary boxes, site sizing table, BOM table, token summary

yaml.content: Structured data with summary, sites array, and bom array

dns_dhcp_combined.sizing_method: QPS, LPS, and combinedObjects with 1.3x multiplier
